creator: takamune@avrl.mei.co.jp
text:
Epwutil are utilities to manage Japanese EPWING or Electric-Book based CD-ROM.

This port uses the parameter '_MANPAGES'
 to install formatted on-line manual pages to ${PREFIX}/man/ja/cat1/.

I feel uneasy about that
	o  Formatted pages may be cleaned up by cron !?
	o  Parameters which begin with '_' should not be used ?
